news.title: What Makes the World Cup Hit Different? Ask the Music Industry
news.lede: The World Cup is in France. But a new era of globalization and international trade has created a rising demand for Latin music, and the world’s biggest soccer tournament needs anthem. Enter Puerto Rican singer Ricky Martin. A man blessed with a divine voice and the charisma to sell it anywhere.

news.title: World Cup 2026: 14 times more harmful social media posts than in 2022
news.lede: The 2026 World Cup began on 11 June and concludes with the final on Sunday, 19 July. There have been 14 times more harmful posts and comments during the 2026 World Cup compared to the 2022 tournament, Fifa's social media protection service has found. A total of more than seven million messages have been identified and removed this summer. That is a significant increase from 470,000 such posts and comments at the previous World Cup.

news.title: America’s World Cup report card: some As for atmosphere, but F for affordability
news.lede: How did the United States do in its second swing at hosting the men’s showpiece event? The stadiums were mostly received well. The accessibility, less so. Come rain or smokescreen, Sunday will bring the 2026 World Cup to its bombastic end.

news.title: Football Daily | France v England in the third-place playoff: the game nobody wants to play
news.lede: Saturday’s rebranded “bronze final” between France and England in Miami might feel like a modern, Gianni-coded exercise in squeezing the product dry, but the third-place playoff is a staple of World Cup history, even if it remains the game nobody wants to play in. The very first TPPO came in 1934, Germany defeating Austria 3-2 in a match engulfed in murky, menacing geopolitics. Thankfully, the fixture quickly became a more knockabout affair – Brazil swaggered on to the world stage by beating Sweden 4-2 in 1938, and France put six past West Germany in a nine-goal feast of football 20 years later. Just Fontaine scored four that day, later to be joined by Thomas Müller, Davor Suker and Toto Schillaci in using the fixture to pad their Golden Boot stats – a tactic Kylian Mbappé might want to try against a punch-drunk England side and pip Lionel Messi to another personal accolade as a result.

news.title: France predicted.lineup today vs England: World Cup starting XI projection
news.lede: France won't be playing in the World Cup final for the third time in a row, relegated to the third-place match after losing to Spain in the semifinals. Les Bleus had looked like the best team at this tournament and were a favorite to win it all for the third time before running into a Spain buzzsaw that has given up just one goal in its seven World Cup games. This consolation match against England is something nobody wants to play in, but it's still the World Cup and both coaches have expressed their respect for the game. "I have a duty for this game," France boss Didier Deschamps told reporters Miami.

news.lede: France and England face off in the third-place match of the 2026 World Cup today. The game will be played at Hard Rock Stadium in Miami Gardens, Florida. How can you watch the England vs France soccer match on Saturday, July 18? How can you stream the 2026 FIFA World Cup matchup?

news.title: Where is the next World Cup 2030? Which countries are hosting?
news.lede: This content is provided by Exco Player and may use cookies or similar technologies. Please click 'Allow and Continue' below to load the content. The 2030 World Cup will be unlike any previous edition of football's biggest tournament. For the first time in the competition's history, matches will be staged across three continents, with six countries sharing hosting duties to celebrate the centenary of the World Cup.
